title: Ciynay #5513
definition:
Sinite = see Sin "thorn" or "clay"

 1) a tribe of the Canaanites descended from Canaan inhabiting the
    northern part of the Lebanon district
nasbUsage:

 1) a tribe of the Canaanites descended from Canaan inhabiting the
    northern part of the Lebanon district
